title: POST /api/operations/invoke request payload (HTS-100)
description: Request body for invoking a Tier 1, Tier 2, or Tier 3 operation on a selected segment. Tier 0 (edit_boundary, split, merge) keeps its existing routes and is not handled by this schema.

series_id.description: Identifier of the time series containing the target segment.

segment_id.description: Identifier of the segment that the operation targets.

tier.description: Operation tier. Tier 0 is not routed through this endpoint.

op_name.description: Canonical operation name as registered in the dispatch table (frontend palette names).

params.description: Op-specific parameters. Validated per op by the service layer.

segments.description: All segments of the segmentation. Bounds are inclusive integer indices into sample_values.

compensation_mode.description: Required for ops in OP-051's required-mode set; ignored otherwise.

target_class.description: Target class label for validators that need it (e.g. yNN).
